title: kosteletzkya pentacarpos var. albiflora
intro: Kosteletzkya pentacarpos var. albiflora, also known as the white flowered sea hollyhock, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Kosteletzkya pentacarpos var. albiflora include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a remedy for snake bites and scorpion stings. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are applied topically to affected areas or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
